marson_t1d_lodo.exchangeable_unit: perturbation gene within donor-pair; pooled test rows across 4 folds
marson_t1d_lodo.pipeline: committed src/trustlayer/conformal.py run_lodo (4 donors, 6 donor-pairs, LODO)
marson_t1d_lodo.target: y = log1p(L2norm(DE zscore over trans genes, on-target excluded))

norman_k562.pipeline: recalibrated split-conformal, identical method, per run_norman_recalibration.py
norman_k562.target: y = log1p(L2norm(Welch DE zscore over 9780-gene panel, on-target excluded))

honesty_contract: prereg frozen before scoring fixes; residual gap reported plainly; committed pipeline scored (not a surrogate); a partial fix is a valid honest outcome; do NOT claim full closure with a deployable method unless worst-stratum coverage meets the preset band.

methods.baseline: committed global split-conformal (single per-fold quantile of |resid|)
methods.cqr: (c) Conformalized Quantile Regression (Romano, Patterson, Candes 2019): GBM quantile regressors at alpha/2 and 1-alpha/2, conformalize with E=max(q_lo-y, y-q_hi)
methods.mondrian_oracle: (a') ORACLE effect-magnitude Mondrian: bins by TRUE y (uses label; NON-DEPLOYABLE upper bound, labeled as oracle) — quantifies the ceiling of bin-conditional CP
methods.mondrian_pred: (a) DEPLOYABLE effect-magnitude Mondrian: bins by PREDICTED magnitude (pred), per-bin calibration quantile applied to test rows in same predicted bin (Vovk Mondrian CP)
methods.normalized: (b) normalized/localized conformal (Lei et al 2018; Papadopoulos 2008): score s=|y-pred|/sigma_hat(x), sigma_hat from a difficulty regressor fit on calib |resid|

metrics.marginal_coverage: pooled coverage across all test rows (must remain valid, guardrail)
metrics.mean_interval_width: mean half-width in target units (efficiency guardrail)
metrics.per_stratum_coverage: fraction of stratum test rows with |y-pred| <= interval half-width
metrics.worst_stratum_coverage: min over strata of per-stratum coverage (PRIMARY)

power.bootstrap: cluster bootstrap resampling exchangeable units (perturbation genes) with replacement
power.report: 95% percentile CI on per-stratum coverage, worst-stratum coverage, marginal coverage

problem: Under donor-blocked leave-one-donor-out (LODO) split-conformal (committed src/trustlayer/conformal.py), MARGINAL coverage is valid (0.793/0.895/0.949 at nominal 0.80/0.90/0.95) but CONDITIONAL coverage on the LARGEST TRUE-EFFECT-MAGNITUDE stratum collapses (~0.60-0.68 at nominal 0.90). The gate grants false trust exactly where effects are biggest. Reproduced on the committed pipeline before this prereg.

strata.definition: effect-magnitude quantile bins on the TRUE target y (the axis the break is disclosed on)
strata.worst_stratum: the top (largest-effect) quantile bin is the pre-registered worst stratum of interest; worst-stratum coverage is reported as min over all strata

success_criterion_preset: PRIMARY (deployable methods only): 'fully_closes' iff worst-stratum coverage >= nominal-0.05 at ALL THREE levels; 'partial' iff worst-stratum coverage improves by >=0.05 over baseline at the 0.90 headline but stays below nominal-0.05; 'no' iff no material improvement. The oracle Mondrian is reported separately as the non-deployable ceiling and does NOT count toward the deployable verdict.
title: A3 conditional-coverage break: pre-registered evaluation of principled conformal fixes
